title: Server Commands
body:
# Server commands mod:

## Commands:
1. **```/back```. Return to your last death location.**
 
![/back command in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c268477ad518665a79c07ba1fdbc7f9de7d2043.png)
  
2. ```/hub``` or ```/lobby```, return to the spawn location. (The server's spawn)

![/lobby command in action.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2583afb435b82bf43de8949a7bff1076118ed0d7_0.webp)

3. ```/freeze``` or ```/cuff```. Freeze any player (Requires OP)

### Want to submit a command?
fill out [this form!](https://forms.gle/MtLDHq3vsJHSDWX88)

**Currently adding:**
- User suggested /discord command to list a discord server ad (customized/made by admin/s)
